title: BLUELIGHT RAT: Obfuscated Script Execution
description: Detects obfuscation techniques (XOR key 0xCF, Base64, SVG-embedded JS) in command lines indicative of BLUELIGHT payload delivery and defense evasion.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ('Process Name' like '%powershell.exe' or 'Process Name' like '%wscript.exe' or 'Process Name' like '%cscript.exe' or 'Process Name' like '%mshta.exe') and ('Command Line' like '%FromBase64String%' or 'Command Line' like '%ToBase64String%' or 'Command Line' like '%-enc %' or 'Command Line' like '%-encodedcommand%' or 'Command Line' like '%XOR%' or 'Command Line' like '%-bxor%' or 'Command Line' like '%Invoke-Expression%') | stats count by 'Host Name (Server)', 'Process Name', 'Command Line'
falsepositives: Legitimate encoded PowerShell scripts used by IT automation
Software deployment tools using encoded parameters
splunk_original: index=wineventlog EventCode=4688 NewProcessName IN ("*powershell.exe","*wscript.exe","*iexplore.exe") CommandLine IN ("*FromBase64String*","*SVG*","*XOR*","*char*") | table _time, NewProcessName, CommandLine, SubjectUserName
